free_text: -THE SPECTRUM OF ALPHA PARTICLES FROM NEUTRON
2 VAN DER GRAAFF GENERATORS WITH MAXIMUM
2CM DIAM, 2 CM HIGH. SERVED AS BOTH TARGET
.SPECTRA ARE ANALYSED WITH THE STATISTICAL MODEL
USING OPTICAL MODEL COMPOUND CROSS SECTIONS.
A LEVEL DENSITY EXPRESSION OF THE FORM
WITH E THE EXCITATION ENERGY,DELTA THE PAIRING
ENERGY, AND A THE FITTED LEVEL DENSITY WAS USED.
ANGULAR DISTRIBUTIONS ARE SYMMETRIC ABOUT 90 DEG
WITH A MINIMUM AT THIS ANGLE.
.DERIVED FROM THE ALPHA SPECTRUM BY A STATISTICAL
MODEL COMPARISON USING THE NEGATIVE Q-VALUE,
.DERIVED FROM STATISTICAL MODEL FIT TO THE
.DERIVED FROM STATISTICAL MODEL FIT TO NA-23(N,A)
DERIVED FROM TOTAL ALPHA SPECTRUM INTEGRAL.
